allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Stores module for E-commerce with inactive store filtering

- Create StoresController with full CRUD operations \(create, edit, delete, status toggle\)
- Add store views \(index, create, edit\) with badge-style UI matching products module
- Add dynamic filtering by name and status in stores listing
- Add image upload with loading indicator for store logo
- Update sidebar navigation to link to stores module
- Filter products by active stores across all modules:
  - ProductsController: hide products from inactive stores
  - OrdersCustomAddController: exclude inactive store products from order creation
- Add dedicated status update endpoint for AJAX status toggle

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add discount restrictions and order validation with change detection

Discount Restrictions Feature:
- Add EcomProductDiscountRestriction model and migration
- Add restrictions management page for discounts \(/ecom-discounts-restrictions\)
- Support restriction types: All Products, Specific Stores, Specific Products
- Add expandable product rows showing variants with images and prices
- Filter discounts by restrictions in order creation

Order Creation Enhancements:
- Add Step 6: Affiliates placeholder in order wizard
- Add real-time data validation on Next button clicks:
  - Step 1→2: Validate product prices, stock, availability
  - Step 4→5: Validate shipping rate changes
  - Step 5→6: Validate discount validity and restrictions
- Add Changes Detected modal with mandatory acknowledgment
- Show toastr notifications when changes are applied
- User must review changes before proceeding to next step

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
